positive: A minimalist, stylized woodland animal gathering scene. The main subjects are a curious fox, a sleek raven, and a plump badger, arranged in a triangular composition. They are positioned amongst stylized, oversized foliage and glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The art style should be neo-traditional watercolor illustration, with bold black outlines and soft, jewel-toned washes of color (deep emerald, sapphire blue, burnt orange). Composition must feature clean, separated silhouettes with high contrast against a creamy, light background. Perfect for a center-chest apparel print. Highly detailed, volumetric lighting, graphic novel aesthetic.
